sourceMovie.title: TÁR
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto TÁR (2022) as a music theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The music and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Rocketman
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If TÁR clicked for you, Rocketman (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in music and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after TÁR?
faq.answer: Try Rocketman, Amadeus, August Rush—each shares DNA with TÁR while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is TÁR?
faq.answer: TÁR (2022) is best described as Music, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is TÁR worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this music lane.
